name: 持刀對峙（弱者反抗）
description: 侍女Vivien持刀阻擋來搶食的冷宮妃嬪們，在弱勢一方的絕境中展現保護主人的決心。刀刃的威脅感與侍女的弱小形成張力。
tags: 孤身持刀面對群體的壓迫場面，寒光閃爍中的堅決表情

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Go ahead and try. This blade's got no eyes. If it takes a hand or a foot, that won't be my fault. Don't you dare mess around.
examples.context: 孤身持刀面對群體的壓迫場面，寒光閃爍中的堅決表情
